analysis_description: Round 4 Phase 1 complete (counterparty IDs, ROUND_4 days 1-3). Read round4work/suggested direction.txt Phase 1, round4description.txt, outputs/r4_initial_analysis_summary.txt. Ran run_r4_phase1_counterparty.py (forward mids, aggressor inference, bursts, graph, baseline residuals).
used_to_decide: Phase 1 gate satisfied; see round4_phase1_complete for per-bullet paths, top hypotheses, and nulls. Proceed to Phase 2 burst-conditioned rules + execution tests when instructed.

round4_phase1_complete.methodology: Forward mid: K-th strictly later price snapshot for same (day,symbol) after trade ts; concurrent book via last snapshot with ts<=trade ts. Aggressor: trade price>=ask => buyer_agg; price<=bid => seller_agg; else ambig. Horizons K in {5,20,100}. Hour bucket = (ts//10000)%24. Spread bin on traded symbol: 0<=2, 1:3-5, 2>=6. Burst = >=3 trades same (day,timestamp).

bullets.conclusion: Pooled K=20 screen: Mark 67 buyer_agg on VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mean fwd mid ~+1.81 (n=164, t~5.86); day-split +2.03 / +1.45 / +2.02 on days 1/2/3. Mark 49 buyer_agg extract n=105 mean ~+1.83. Full stratified-by-hour/spread/burst tables are partially embedded in the script; primary table is the screen JSON.

bullets.bullet: 2) Deviation from bot baseline (buyer_agg, fwd20, cell mean by buyer,seller,symbol)
bullets.conclusion: Residuals vs cell means: mean ~0, stdev ~6 (n=1465 buyer_agg) — no giant systematic residual in the mean; pair structure in baseline JSON.
Mark 01 -> Mark 22 dominates directed counts (matches initial summary); motif timing vs extract spikes not auto-scored in this pass.

318 burst timestamps; pooled extract fwd20 mean ~+0.30 after burst vs ~-0.27 on 200 random non-burst trade-time controls. By day (r4_burst_vs_control_by_day.json): day1 burst mean -0.13 vs ctrl -0.46; day2 +0.33 vs +0.44; day3 +0.62 vs -0.71 — mixed stability.
Deferred without full L2 book reconstruction; seller_agg rows in screen JSON hint at weaker follow-through for some names — candidate no-quote list for later.

top_5_tradeable_edges_hypothesis.edge: Multi-trade bursts vs random trade-time control on extract fwd20 — pooled mid lift ~0.57, but day-split is mixed (day1 slight negative burst mean vs better control; days 2-3 favor bursts). Treat as hypothesis for Phase 2 with day conditioning.
top_5_tradeable_edges_hypothesis.effect: pooled 0.30 vs -0.27; by day see r4_burst_vs_control_by_day.json

top_5_tradeable_edges_hypothesis.edge: Mark 67 buyer-aggressive extract prints associate with positive short-horizon extract mid; sign holds on each day.
Mark 49 buyer_agg extract — positive pooled mean fwd20 (~+1.83, n=105).
Mark 01->Mark 22 graph dominance — structural conditioning for Phase 2 basket/burst rules.
Negative: VEV_5300 Mark01->Mark22 fwd20 mean ~-0.08 (n=395) — not a naive long tail.

negative_or_null_findings: Mean-centered residuals vs (buyer,seller,symbol) buyer_agg baseline ~0 — no single giant mean mis-fit.
Mark 22 buyer_agg extract has tiny n per day — too sparse to claim stable participant alpha without merging days or loosening aggressor filter.
No bid/ask or worse-fill PnL proof in Phase 1.
round4_phase1_complete.phase2_gate: Phase 1 quantitative bullets documented with output paths; Phase 2 may proceed.
